message:
feat(indexer): wire emit_tracing_summary into persist_lexical_refresh_ledger [coding_agent_session_search-ibuuh.24]

Fifth ibuuh.24 slice this session — completes the operator-facing
benchmark pipeline by wiring the cross-run tracing into the publish
path. Operators now see "this rebuild was N% slower than the
previous publish" automatically in default-level logs without
running any benchmark harness.

What landed:
- New helper load_prior_refresh_evidence_for_comparison(index_path)
  reads the prior .lexical-refresh-evidence.json sidecar (if any)
  and parses it as RefreshLedgerEvidence. Read failure is non-fatal
  and logged at debug — a missing prior sidecar is the EXPECTED
  first-publish case (fresh data dir or sidecar pruned by retention).
- persist_lexical_refresh_ledger now:
  1. Reads the prior sidecar BEFORE overwriting it.
  2. Writes the new ledger.
  3. Writes the new evidence sidecar (existing behavior).
  4. If the prior was readable: computes
     current.compare_to(&prior).emit_tracing_summary().
- Severity tiering of the comparison emission lives inside
  RefreshLedgerEvidenceComparison::emit_tracing_summary (≥+25%
  ⇒ warn, ≤-10% ⇒ info, else debug — see commit 4d4b168d).

Regression test
persist_lexical_refresh_ledger_emits_cross_run_tracing_when_prior_sidecar_exists
pins both branches of the wiring contract:
- First publish (no prior sidecar): tracing collector observes ZERO
  cross-run-comparison events. A regression that always-emits would
  trip here.
- Second publish (prior sidecar present): collector observes EXACTLY
  one event at WARN level (second ledger has 200ms scan vs prior
  100ms = +100% slowdown, well past the +25% warn threshold). A
  regression that never-emits, that miscategorizes severity, or
  that emits multiple events would trip here.
- Message-text invariant on the warn-tier emission ("significant
  slowdown") so a regression in tier-routing or message phrasing
  inside emit_tracing_summary trips through the wiring's gate too.

Existing publish-path tests
(authoritative_publish_emits_lexical_refresh_evidence_sidecar +
rebuild_tantivy_from_db_persists_packet_refresh_ledger) still green.

The full ibuuh.24 evidence pipeline is now complete this session:
- 1ffd8494 RefreshLedgerEvidence single-run vocabulary
- 95961840 .lexical-refresh-evidence.json per-publish sidecar
- e2e002ba RefreshLedgerEvidenceComparison cross-run comparator
- 4d4b168d emit_tracing_summary severity-tiered helper
- this commit publish-path wiring with first-publish vs second-publish
  contract pinned

Operators get cross-run regression visibility on every publish
automatically. Future ibuuh.24 slices (CI hard gates with
project-specific thresholds, cass status surface integration) can
build on top of the streaming evidence + tracing already in place.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
